languages.text: "Знаете, даже спустя столетия ваша кровь течет в жилах человека по имени Кунрад..."

traits.locale_text: "Знаете, даже спустя столетия ваша кровь течет в жилах человека по имени Кунрад..."

languages.text: "You know, centuries from now, your blood will flow in the veins of a person by the name of Kunrad..."

languages.text: “你可知道，数百年后，你的血脉将在一位名叫昆拉德的人身上流淌……”
languages.original_text: "You know, centuries from now, your blood will flow in the veins of a person by the name of Kunrad..."

traits.locale_text: “你可知道，数百年后，你的血脉将在一位名叫昆拉德的人身上流淌……”

languages.text: « Vous savez, dans les siècles à venir, votre sang coulera dans les veines d'une personne du nom de Kunrad... »
languages.original_text: "You know, centuries from now, your blood will flow in the veins of a person by the name of Kunrad..."

languages.text: "Biliyor musun... Yüzyıllar sonra senin kanın, Kunrad adında birinin damarlarında akacak..."
languages.original_text: "You know, centuries from now, your blood will flow in the veins of a person by the name of Kunrad..."

traits.locale_text: "Biliyor musun... Yüzyıllar sonra senin kanın, Kunrad adında birinin damarlarında akacak..."

languages.text: «¿Sabe? Dentro de siglos, su sangre fluirá por las venas de alguien llamado Kunrad...».
languages.original_text: "You know, centuries from now, your blood will flow in the veins of a person by the name of Kunrad..."

traits.locale_text: «¿Sabe? Dentro de siglos, su sangre fluirá por las venas de alguien llamado Kunrad...».

languages.text: "Wisst Ihr, in ein paar Jahrhunderten wird Euer Blut in den Adern eines Mannes namens Kunrad fließen ..."
languages.original_text: "You know, centuries from now, your blood will flow in the veins of a person by the name of Kunrad..."

traits.locale_text: "Wisst Ihr, in ein paar Jahrhunderten wird Euer Blut in den Adern eines Mannes namens Kunrad fließen ..."

languages.text: 「君が知ってるとおり、何世紀も後の未来、君の子孫はクンラートという名の男の血管を流れているだろう…」
